CustomField.description:
f VPR Approval has a date then Next PR Due Date = VPR Approval + Periodic Review Cycle (months)
If VPR Approval is blank/null, then Next PR Due Date = EVP Approval + Periodic Review Cycle (months)
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(VPR_Approval__c)), ADDMONTHS(VPR_Approval__c, Periodic_Review_Cycle_months__c), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(EVP_Approval__c)), ADDMONTHS(EVP_Approval__c, Periodic_Review_Cycle_months__c), NULL ) )
CustomField.label: Next PR Due Date
